chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 586 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.3134/2025 2. For order on office objections No.1, 2, 3, 4, 18 & 23 3. For order on Misc. No.3135/2025 4. For hearing of main case 14.02.2025 Petitioner, Muhammad Usman Ali, is present in person 1. Granted. 2. Office objections observed as follows: “1. The documents were not annexed to prove the allegations of Para-1. 2. Para-4 is contradictory with Para08 and petitioner is blowing hot and cold in same breath. 3. Civil court was not approach if any legal right was denied. 4. How this petition is maintainable for recovery of amount, when the remedy of civil suit is available under the law? 18. Petition to be filed with proper left vide margin. 23. Latches to be explained” 3-4. Petitioner is appearing in person could not dispel any of them. In view hereof, petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
